top_signals.title: Bitcoin Bottom Hunters Are Eyeing Up AI Frenzy,  SpaceX IPO
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin’s rebound this week from the depths of despair below $60,000 has reignited a familiar Wall Street ritual: trying to call the bottom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Biggest Shipment of US Fuel to Cuba Since 1960 Is Off as Blacklist Expands
top_signals.summary: A Florida oil trading house that was set to dispatch the largest US fuel shipment to Cuba since 1960 is shelving plans after the Trump administration ramped up pressure on the island.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Early Warning Signs of Supply-Chain Attacks Live in the Dark Web
top_signals.summary: GitHub access sales, leaked repositories, and stolen API keys can all become supply-chain attack footholds. Flare explores how underground forums expose early signals tied to software supply-chain risk. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Mutual Fund Dark Ages’ Beckon as Brokerage Platform ETF Fees Rise
top_signals.summary: Schwab considers new platform fees for ETF issuers
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: XRP sentiment falls to 8-month low, and that has been a buy signal before
Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
top_signals.summary: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
